message:
fix(core): hoist regex out of hot loops + guard div/mod zero (ft-3kneg, ft-9n3sp)

Thread-local LRU caches for Regex::new in policy.rs (glob_match, command_patterns),
workflows.rs (DescriptorMatcher::Regex), and search/indexing.rs (custom prompt).
Division/modulo zero guards in command_guard.rs, concurrent_map.rs, kd_tree.rs,
latency_stages.rs, and xor_filter.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
